title: A Rural Revolution
article_text: Originally from a rural village, I used to think the calm life was boring. After a severe examination, I decided to abandon that old premise and move to the city. The rapid development there was a dramatic revolution for me. I was leaning on a bike to distribute flyers when I saw a delight on a child's face. Secondly, I felt grateful for the silence of the library, where I could study protein structures. I was deriving much intellectual pleasure from reading. The efficient public transport made it easy to get around. I was quickly learning how city life could differ from country life. A strange spell of happiness came over me. I was finally comfortable with my new life.

sentences.en: Originally from a rural village, I used to think the calm life was boring.
sentences.zh: 我原本来自一个乡村，过去认为平静的生活很无聊。

sentences.en: After a severe examination, I decided to abandon that old premise and move to the city.
sentences.zh: 在一次严格的考试之后，我决定放弃那个旧前提，搬到城市。

words.eng_def: a test of knowledge or a careful look
to leave or give up completely
an idea that is the basis for something

sentences.en: The rapid development there was a dramatic revolution for me.
sentences.zh: 那里的快速发展对我来说是一场戏剧性的革命。

words.eng_def: a complete change in a system or way of doing things

sentences.en: I was leaning on a bike to distribute flyers when I saw a delight on a child's face.
sentences.zh: 我正靠着一辆自行车分发传单，这时我看到一个孩子脸上露出喜悦。

words.eng_def: to bend or rest against something
a vehicle with two wheels that you ride

sentences.en: Secondly, I felt grateful for the silence of the library, where I could study protein structures.
sentences.zh: 其次，我对图书馆的安静心怀感激，在那里我可以研究蛋白质结构。

words.eng_def: used to introduce the second point
a substance in food that helps the body grow

sentences.en: I was deriving much intellectual pleasure from reading.
sentences.zh: 我从阅读中获得了很多智力上的乐趣。

words.eng_def: to get something from something else
relating to the ability to think and understand

sentences.en: The efficient public transport made it easy to get around.
sentences.zh: 高效的公共交通使出行变得容易。

words.eng_def: working well without wasting time or energy

sentences.en: I was quickly learning how city life could differ from country life.
sentences.zh: 我很快了解到城市生活与乡村生活有何不同。

sentences.en: A strange spell of happiness came over me.
sentences.zh: 一阵奇怪的幸福感涌上我心头。

words.eng_def: a short period of time; magic words

sentences.en: I was finally comfortable with my new life.
sentences.zh: 我终于对自己的新生活感到舒适了。

words.eng_def: a state of physical or mental ease
